result: If I could change the world in one way, I would ensure that everyone was genuinely curious about each other’s experiences, perspectives, and feelings. With true curiosity, people might listen more closely, judge less quickly, and look for understanding first—even in conflict or disagreement. It might not erase all problems, but it could make navigating them together a lot more human.
